candidates.why: Direct cost of goods sold / cost of sales line.

Explicit SG&A-type row exists semantically but appears unpopulated in preview.

Asset/project disclosure, not period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D expense line exists. Not additionally included in XSGA_COMPONENTS because it is likely embedded within the broader operating expense buckets already selected; subtracting XRD from SG&A is the intended PROF treatment.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost total; acceptable fallback but less precise than a dedicated interest expense line.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders in Ørsted A/S
